images.prompt:
[SUBJECT] Two identical human silhouettes stand shoulder to shoulder in a forensic anthropometric line-up, their contours so perfectly registered that they read as a single doubled figure, until a lone freckle on one cheekbone ignites a brand-new orthogonal coordinate axis that rises between them like a pulled seam, peeling the doubled silhouette into two distinct people the moment the representation acquires the dimension it needed.

Foreground Color: #CA8F31 industrial yellow main color in foreground

Background: Flat black #000000
